tagline.en: Almost done -- the garden did amazing this year!
tagline.da: Naesten faerdig -- haven var fantastisk i aar!

theme.hero_task: Take end-of-season photos of every bed

tasks.action: Take photos of each bed for a season memory album

prompt.en: Take a photo of each bed A through E -- compare with your planting day photos!
prompt.da: Tag et billede af hvert bed A til E -- sammenlign med dine plantedags-billeder!

tasks.action: Final kale harvest from Bed C

prompt.en: Big final kale harvest! Enough for a soup or kale chips.
prompt.da: Stor afsluttende groenkaalshoest! Nok til en suppe eller groenkaalschips.

tasks.action: Clear remaining annual plants from all beds

prompt.en: Pull dead annuals, cut back perennials, compost everything. Leave kale if still producing.
prompt.da: Traek doede enaarige op, beskaer fleraaring, kompost alt. Lad groenkal staa hvis den stadig baerer.

prompt.en: Look for tiny green tips from the garlic -- it's already growing underground!
prompt.da: Kig efter smaa groenne spidser fra hvidloegen -- den gror allerede under jorden!

growth_events.event: Kale still harvestable even in late October cold

prompt.en: Kale is the champion of the garden -- still standing when everything else is done!
prompt.da: Groenkal er havens mester -- staar stadig, naar alt andet er faerdigt!

growth_events.event: Strawberry plants dormant under mulch -- safely sleeping

prompt.en: The strawberries are sleeping under their straw blanket -- they'll wake up in spring!
prompt.da: Jordbaererne sover under deres halmtaeppe -- de vaagner igen til foraar!
